doc: Nestable tone + space send effect (ADR-0034): a lowpass into a Freeverb, exposed through an `interface` boundary so a host patch uses it as one node. Boundary: `in` (audio), `tone` (the filter cutoff, presented as a Tone knob per ADR-0034 §4 overrides), `space` (the reverb mix, labeled Space) in; `out` (audio) out. The overrides decorate presentation only — the Arg types are inherited from the inner ports and cannot be overridden.

nodes.doc: Tone control: gentle lowpass ahead of the reverb.
Freeverb tail; `mix` is the boundary's `space` input.
